news.title: EasyJet says possible US bid 'highly opportunistic' as shares jump 10%
news.description: EasyJet responded on Monday by saying it has not held talks with Castlelake but it would ​assess any potential offer if one was made, noting its stock price was "temporarily depressed" by the war's impact on jet fuel prices and customer confidence.
